technical_improvement.baseline_problem: Large document search can return low-quality or irrelevant results.
technical_improvement.mechanism: Assign linked-document scores from scores of linking documents using extrinsic link relationships and iterative recursive rank computation.
technical_improvement.technical_effect: Improved ranking/selectivity of hypermedia search results.

eligibility_flags.recommended_next_step: Keep the claim tied to linked-document processing and search-result ranking rather than a standalone mathematical score.

support_flags.recommended_next_step: Do not treat the old computer-readable-medium wording as modern non-transitory CRM support without practitioner review.

notes: The public excerpts support the link-analysis mechanism and technical-search ranking story.
The CRM family is old-style computer-readable-medium wording and should remain a risk flag for modern drafting.
